purpose: (1) 빡신 앱 아이콘 4안 (다양한 톤) — batch_001 3안 모두 실패, 짧은 prompt 재시도. (2) batch_002 도깨비 4장 LoRA 받은 후 자율 재생성 (Windows 자체 판단)
negative_prompt_default: text, letters, hangul, words, watermark, low quality, blurry, photorealistic, horror

items.prompt: bold red and black square logo, single chinese character 神 in white center, minimal, app icon style
deep crimson red square with thick yellow border, single asian symbol in center, simple flat icon
minimal app icon: black square, single thin gold line forming abstract face shape, premium minimalist
cute cartoon shaman face on red background, simple flat sticker style, app icon

windows_autonomous_note: batch_002 도깨비 4장 (v2_doki_001~004) LoRA 받으면 자율 재생성하고 raw-images/batch_002_lora/ 에 저장 — 이건 별도 batch 번호 안 줌
